name: NurbsCurveKnotList
summary: Provides access to the knot vector of a NURBS curve.

methods.name: ClampEnd
methods.summary: Clamp end knots. Does not modify control point locations.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Contains
methods.summary: Returns an indication of the presence of a value in the knot list.

methods.name: CopyTo
methods.signature: public void CopyTo(double[] array, int arrayIndex)
methods.summary: Copies the list to an array.

params.name: arrayIndex
params.doc: The index into copy will begin.

methods.name: CreatePeriodicKnots
methods.summary: Compute a clamped, uniform, periodic knot vector based on the current degree and control point count. Does not change values of control vertices.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: CreateUniformKnots
methods.summary: Compute a clamped, uniform knot vector based on the current degree and control point count. Does not change values of control vertices.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: EnsurePrivateCopy
methods.summary: If you want to keep a copy of this class around by holding onto it in a variable after a command completes, call EnsurePrivateCopy to make sure that this class is not tied to the document. You can call this function as many times as you want.

methods.name: EpsilonEquals
methods.signature: public bool EpsilonEquals(NurbsCurveKnotList other, double epsilon)
methods.summary: Checks that all values in the other list are sequentially equal within epsilon to the values in this list.

returns.doc: True if values are, orderly, equal within epsilon. False otherwise.

methods.name: IndexOf
methods.summary: Returns the first item in the list.

returns.doc: The index, or -1 if no index is found.

methods.name: InsertKnot(Double)
methods.summary: Inserts a knot and update control point locations. Does not change parameterization or locus of curve.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: InsertKnot(Double, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool InsertKnot(double value, int multiplicity)
methods.summary: Inserts a knot and update control point locations. Does not change parameterization or locus of curve.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: RemoveKnotAt
methods.summary: Remove a knot from a curve and adjusts the remaining control points to maintain curve position as closely as possible.

params.name: t
params.doc: The parameter on the curve that is closest to the knot to be removed.

returns.doc: true if successful, false on failure.

methods.name: RemoveKnots
methods.signature: public bool RemoveKnots(int index0, int index1)
methods.summary: Remove knots from a curve and adjusts the remaining control points to maintain curve position as closely as possible. The knots from Knots[index0] through Knots[index1 - 1] will be removed.

params.name: index0
params.doc: The starting knot index, where Degree-1 < index0 < index1 <= Points.Count-1.

params.name: index1
params.doc: The ending knot index, where Degree-1 < index0 < index1 <= Points.Count-1.

returns.doc: true if successful, false on failure.

methods.name: RemoveMultipleKnots
methods.signature: public int RemoveMultipleKnots(int minimumMultiplicity, int maximumMultiplicity, double tolerance)
methods.summary: Remove multiple knots from this curve.

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: When you remove knots, the shape of the curve is changed. If tolerance is RhinoMath.UnsetValue, any amount of change is permitted. If tolerance is >=0, the maximum distance between the input and output curve is restricted to be <= tolerance.

returns.doc: number of knots removed on success. 0 if no knots were removed

methods.name: SuperfluousKnot
methods.summary: Computes the knots that are superfluous because they are not used in NURBs evaluation. These make it appear so that the first and last curve spans are different from interior spans. http://wiki.mcneel.com/developer/onsuperfluousknot

params.name: start
params.doc: true if the query targets the first knot. Otherwise, the last knot.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Total number of knots in this curve.

properties.name: IsClampedEnd
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not the knot vector is clamped at the end of the curve. Clamped curves are coincident with the first and last control-point. This requires fully multiple knots.

properties.name: IsClampedStart
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not the knot vector is clamped at the start of the curve. Clamped curves start at the first control-point. This requires fully multiple knots.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets or sets the knot vector value at the given index.

properties.name: KnotStyle
properties.summary: Gets the style of the knot vector.
